label: Clean — weather report
text: Today the weather is sunny with a high of 25 degrees. A pleasant day to be outdoors.

label: Clean — product description
text: This laptop features a 15-inch display, 16GB RAM, and a fast SSD. Great for work and study.

label: Mildly negative — complaint
text: The service was slow and the staff were not very helpful. I was disappointed with my experience.

label: Toxic — insult
text: You are completely useless and nobody wants you around. Just go away forever.

label: Potentially biased — gender
text: Women are generally not suited for leadership roles as they tend to be too emotional in decision-making.

label: Potentially biased — racial
text: People from that country are known to be dishonest and untrustworthy in business dealings.

label: Political — neutral framing
text: The government announced new economic policies aimed at reducing inflation and supporting small businesses.

label: Threat
text: If you keep doing that I will make sure you regret it. Do not test me on this.

label: Medical — factual
text: Glioma is a type of brain tumor that originates from glial cells. Early diagnosis significantly improves prognosis.

label: Technical — code description
text: The function iterates over the dataset, applies normalisation, and returns a clean pandas DataFrame ready for model training.
